column3: INNOVATIVE LAB SERVICES LLC - API 4000 LC/MS/MS SYSTEM - PLANNED MAINTENANCE PROCEDURE

All PM tests are run using Chemical Kit P/N 4406127. All Pre and Post tests use the Standard Turbo V Source. Printed copies of all test runs, method files and calibration runs are filed in the instrument IQ/OQ binder with a copy of this procedure.
SIGN OFF - By signing this form you acknowledge that the planned maintenance was completely performed.
PRE-PM SECTION. Pre-PM tests do not need to pass specifications. Record Pre-PM performance.
2.0  POSITIVE ION MODE TEST - Printouts required. Use 50:1 diluted Standard PPG (2x10-6M). Guideline: 10 Scans MCA.
3.0  NEGATIVE ION MODE TEST (10 SCANS MCA) - Printouts required. Use PPG 3000 (2x10-4M) negative PPG solution, no dilution required.
Q3 - m/z 2037.4 is N/A per the procedure
Use diluted reserpine 6:1 (0.16 pmol/ul). Printouts required.
MS/MS Transmission Efficiency %  (m/z 195.0 / attenuated m/z 609.3) x 100  (spec >= 10.0)
1. Check operation of the Turbo V ion source heaters
2. Check lens voltages (Lens Power Supply module)
3. Check RF tuning voltages (Q1 and Q3 QPS AMP module). Only if required, tune QPS AMPs.
4. Check operation of the instrument cooling fans
5. Check operation of the detector. Record CEM voltage:
6. Check AC input voltage. Record AC voltage:
7. Inspect gas tubing for breakage (CAD gas, interface gas tubes, etc)
8. Remove and clean the curtain plate
9. If necessary, remove and clean the orifice plate
10. If necessary, clean the front end of Q0
13. Inspect the oil return systems and if necessary replace the oil filter
14. If applicable, perform PM on Peak Scientific gas generator
15. Reinstall all covers and pump down
16. Re-check operation of the instrument cooling fans
17. If necessary, perform Turbo V ion source maintenance
18. Clear computer temp files (Start/Search/Files and Folders -> *.tmp -> Local Hard Drive (C), (D) -> Search now -> Edit/Select All/Files/Delete/Empty Recycle Bin)
1.0  GAS PRESSURE. Low Gas 1 / Gas 2 pressure can affect turbo spray and sensitivity. Source Exhaust pressure above 60 psi can cause exhaust valve failures.
2.0  VACUUM PRESSURE. Use Analyst software to set CAD gas values.
3.0  POSITIVE ION MODE TEST (10 SCANS MCA) - Printouts required. Use 50:1 diluted Standard PPG (2x10^6M). See Appendix A.
4.0  NEGATIVE ION MODE TEST (10 SCANS MCA) - Printouts required. Use undiluted PPG 3000 (3x10^4M). See Appendix A.
Q3 - m/z 2037.4 is N/A per the procedure
Use diluted reserpine 6:1 (0.16 pmol/ul). Printouts required.
MS/MS Transmission Efficiency %  (m/z 195.0 / attenuated m/z 609.3) x 100  (spec >= 10.0)
6.0  PRINT AND ATTACH TESTS SPECTRA RESULTS
